description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the main branch, on every pull request, and daily on the main branch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing in different environments, including Emscripten, Native Client, and AddressSanitizer, as well as linting JavaScript code and collecting code coverage statistics. Each job should have specific steps for checking out sources, installing dependencies, compiling, testing, and uploading artifacts.
